message.content:
@startuml
participant "User" as User
participant "JobManager" as JobManager
participant "Nodes" as Nodes
participant "ESDM" as ESDM
participant "Post Processing Library" as PostProcessingLibrary
participant "Storage" as Storage

User -> JobManager: submit job(IN, OUT)
JobManager -> Nodes: compute
Nodes -> ESDM: write async OUT=y
ESDM -> Storage: write snapshot (async)
ESDM -> PostProcessingLibrary: trigger post processing if region effected
PostProcessingLibrary -> Storage: perform post processing
PostProcessingLibrary -> ESDM: (could write result directly)
ESDM -> PostProcessingLibrary: return
PostProcessingLibrary -> Storage: write post processing result
Nodes -> ESDM: return
ESDM -> Nodes: OUT files become visible
Storage -> User: All OUT files become visible to subsequent users.

ESDM -> Nodes: read IN=x
Nodes -> Storage: return
Storage -> ESDM: return

loop multiple iterations
ESDM -> Nodes: compute
Nodes -> ESDM: write async OUT=y
ESDM -> Storage: write snapshot (async)
ESDM -> PostProcessingLibrary: trigger post processing if region effected
PostProcessingLibrary -> Storage: perform post processing
PostProcessingLibrary -> ESDM: (could write result directly)
ESDM -> PostProcessingLibrary: return
PostProcessingLibrary -> Storage: write post processing result
Nodes -> ESDM: return
ESDM -> Nodes: OUT files become visible
Storage -> User: All OUT files become visible to subsequent users.

@enduml
